title: Adversarial Networks Path
description: Build fluency in Adversarial Networks inside Generative Models by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Auxiliary Classifier GAN (ACGAN)
steps.summary: ** Auxiliary Classifier GAN (ACGAN) belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Adversarial Networks. It sits inside Generative Models / Adversarial Networks. Compare it with ACGAN (Auxiliary Classifier GAN) and Auxiliary Classifier GAN (AC-GAN).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: ACGAN (Auxiliary Classifier GAN)
steps.summary: ** ACGAN (Auxiliary Classifier GAN) belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Adversarial Networks. It sits inside Generative Models / Adversarial Networks. Compare it with Auxiliary Classifier GAN (ACGAN) and Auxiliary Classifier GAN (AC-GAN).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Auxiliary Classifier GAN (AC-GAN)
steps.summary: ** Auxiliary Classifier GAN (AC-GAN) belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Adversarial Networks. It sits inside Generative Models / Adversarial Networks. Compare it with AC-GAN (Auxiliary Classifier GAN) and Auxiliary Classifier GAN (ACGAN).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Wasserstein GAN (WGAN)
steps.summary: Wasserstein GAN (WGAN) belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Adversarial Networks. It sits inside Generative Models / Adversarial Networks. Start after Wasserstein GAN and WGAN. It opens into Wasserstein GAN with Gradient Penalty (WGAN-GP) and WGAN-GP (Wasserstein GAN with Gradient Penalty).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Self-attention GAN
steps.summary: Self-attention GAN belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Adversarial Networks. It sits inside Generative Models / Adversarial Networks. Start after Self-attention and Self-Attention Networks. It opens into Self-Attention GAN (SAGAN) and Self-Attention GAN Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Generative Adversarial Network
steps.summary: Generative Adversarial Network belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Adversarial Networks. It sits inside Generative Models / Adversarial Networks. Start after Generative Model and Generative Models. It opens into Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) and Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: GAN Inversion Techniques Extensions
steps.summary: GAN Inversion Techniques Extensions belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Adversarial Networks. It sits inside Generative Models / Adversarial Networks. Start after GAN Inversion Extensions and GAN Inversion Techniques. It opens into GAN Inversion Extensions Extensions Techniques Enhancements Techniques and GAN Inversion Techniques Extensions Techniques Enhancements Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
